_meta.purpose: CAC multipliers and acquisition channel data injected into all sector prompts
sources: Meta Ad Library pricing estimates for Jordan 2025

jordanAdCostContext.dominantB2CChannel: Instagram (primary for discovery and purchase in Amman)

word_of_mouth.label: Word of Mouth / Personal Referrals
word_of_mouth.notes: Dominant in Amman. Strongest channel for F&B and B2B. Referrals via friends/family.

social_media_organic.label: Organic Social Media (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook)
social_media_organic.notes: Instagram is THE channel in Amman. Best for 6+ month horizon. Content creation is the main investment.

paid_ads_meta.label: Paid Ads - Meta (Instagram/Facebook)
paid_ads_meta.notes: Faster results. Jordan CPM is among the lowest in digital advertising.

paid_ads_google.label: Paid Ads - Google Search & Shopping
paid_ads_google.costType: Ongoing spend, higher CPC than Meta
paid_ads_google.notes: Higher intent than social. 2-3x more expensive than Instagram. Good for service discovery.

seo_organic_search.label: SEO / Organic Search
seo_organic_search.notes: Amman market not yet SEO-saturated. Arabic SEO underserved — opportunity.

delivery_platform.label: Delivery Platform (Talabat, Careem)
delivery_platform.notes: Talabat: 25% MAU growth in 2024, 6M+ active customers in Jordan. High CAC but guaranteed traffic. Diversify to own channels to reduce dependency.

direct_sales_b2b.label: Direct Sales / Cold Outreach (B2B)
direct_sales_b2b.notes: High CAC but high contract value justifies it. Wasta (personal network) reduces effective CAC by ~50%.

partnerships_referral_programs.label: Partnerships, Affiliate, Referral Programs
partnerships_referral_programs.notes: Efficient if partner network exists. Jordan ecosystem: leverage JHub, accelerators, Chamber of Commerce networks.

marketplace_listing.label: Marketplace Listing (Noon, OpenSooq, Amazon)
marketplace_listing.notes: Noon/OpenSooq growing. Commission 5-15%. Credibility boost for new brands.

cacByChannel_JOD.note: Approximate CAC ranges in JOD. Multiply by sector-specific base CAC for accuracy.
